review_command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

findings.title: Cosmetic registry nested-ternary indentation
findings.summary: registry.js has a syntactically correct nested ternary indentation style carried from earlier slices; tests and validator pass.

findings.title: Static HumanApproval catalog fields are not S02 behavior
findings.summary: The P00 type/shape registry already lists HumanApproval required fields and status lifecycle; this is static catalog metadata, not lifecycle or field behavior implemented by S02.

P3.title: Cosmetic registry nested-ternary indentation
P3.resolution: No code change required; syntax, tests, and validator pass.

P3.title: Static HumanApproval catalog fields are not S02 behavior
P3.resolution: Accepted as pre-existing static P00 catalog metadata; S02 only implements approval_id identifier behavior.

followup_review_reason: No P0/P1/P2 findings and no post-review code changes are required.
